verdictSummary: Ledger has two claims, both correctly tagged FUTURE_LANE_ONLY (a Dermatology residents-abroad item and a generic Careers link). Zero PUBLIC_SAFE_USCE claims exist, so no public-safety surface. Source corpus is overwhelmingly health-lab/news/research pages — Tier 1 USCE coverage is effectively unsearched, but classifications themselves are internally consistent and safe to merge.
